problem_text_cn:
3-13 如图3-15所示，两个等高的小定滑轮相距2m，物块A和B的质量各为1kg，它们之间用轻绳连接，在绳的水平段中点挂一个质量1.9kg的小物块C，开始时均处于静止状态。而后C被释放，三物块同时开始运动，当C下降0.75m时，试问：
(1) A, B, C的速度各是多少？
(2) A, B, C的加速度各是多少？
problem_text_en:
3-13 As shown in Figure 3-15, two small fixed pulleys of equal height are 2m apart. Blocks A and B have a mass of 1kg each and are connected by a light rope. A small block C of mass 1.9kg is hung at the midpoint of the horizontal segment of the rope. Initially, they are all at rest. Then C is released, and the three blocks start moving simultaneously. When C has descended 0.75m, determine:
(1) The velocities of A, B, and C.
(2) The accelerations of A, B, and C.
problem_solution_cn:
解 物块C的悬挂点到滑轮间距记为$l=1\,m$，C下降$h=0.75\,m$时构成的倾角$\theta$如图3-16所示，应有
$$ \sin\theta=\frac{4}{5},\quad\cos\theta=\frac{3}{5},\quad\cot\theta=\frac{3}{4}. $$
(1) 所求A, B, C的速度各记为$v_{A}$, $v_{B}$, $v_{C}$，因$m_{A}=m_{B}$, $v_{A}=v_{B}$。联合地面，机械能守恒，有
$$ 2\left(\frac{1}{2}m_{A}v_{A}^{2}\right)+\frac{1}{2}m_{C}v_{C}^{2}=m_{C}gh-2\left[m_{A}g\left(\frac{l}{\sin\theta}-l\right)\right], $$
将有关数据代入后，可得
$$ v_{A}^{2}+0.95v_{C}^{2}=9.065\,\text{m}^{2}\!/\!\text{s}^{2}. $$
将速度关联式$v_{C}\cos\theta=v_{A}$代入后，解得
$$ v_{C}=2.63\,\text{m}/\!\text{s},\quad v_{A}=v_{B}=1.58\,\text{m}/\!\text{s}. $$
(2) 绳中张力记为$T$，A的向上加速度记为$a_{A}$，C的向下加速度记为$a_{C}$，则有
$$ T-m_{A}g=m_{A}a_{A}, $$
$$ m_{C}g-2T\cos\theta=m_{C}a_{C}. $$
消去$T$，可得
$$ m_{C}g-2m_{A}(g+a_{A})\cos\theta=m_{C}a_{C}. \tag{1} $$
$a_{C}$沿绳方向分量$a_{C}\cos\theta$，由$a_{C}=a_{A}$和$a_{C_{c}}$合成。参考图3-17，应有
$$ a_{C}\cos\theta=a_{A}-a_{C_{c}}, $$
$$ a_{C_{c}}=\frac{(v_{C}\sin\theta)^{2}}{l/\sin\theta}, $$
后一式是考虑到$a_{C_{c}}$因C相对绳的左上端作角向运动引起而写出。整理后，得
$$ a_{C}\cos\theta=a_{A}-\frac{v_{C}^{2}\sin^{2}\theta}{l}. \tag{2} $$
将有关数据代入(1)和(2)式，可算得
$$ a_{A}=a_{B}=4.14\,\text{m}/\!\text{s}^{2}, $$
$$ a_{C}=0.996\,\text{m}/\!\text{s}^{2}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution Denote the distance from the hanging point of block C to a pulley as $l=1\,\text{m}$. The inclination angle $\theta$ formed when C descends $h=0.75\,\text{m}$ is shown in Figure 3-16; we have
$$ \sin\theta=\frac{4}{5},\quad\cos\theta=\frac{3}{5},\quad\cot\theta=\frac{3}{4}. $$
(1) Let the required velocities of A, B, C be $v_{A}$, $v_{B}$, $v_{C}$. Since $m_{A}=m_{B}$, $v_{A}=v_{B}$. Together with the ground, mechanical energy is conserved:
$$ 2\left(\frac{1}{2}m_{A}v_{A}^{2}\right)+\frac{1}{2}m_{C}v_{C}^{2}=m_{C}gh-2\left[m_{A}g\left(\frac{l}{\sin\theta}-l\right)\right]. $$
Substituting the relevant data gives
$$ v_{A}^{2}+0.95v_{C}^{2}=9.065\,\text{m}^{2}\!/\!\text{s}^{2}. $$
Using the velocity relation $v_{C}\cos\theta=v_{A}$, we obtain
$$ v_{C}=2.63\,\text{m}/\!\text{s},\quad v_{A}=v_{B}=1.58\,\text{m}/\!\text{s}. $$
(2) Denote the rope tension as $T$, the upward acceleration of A as $a_{A}$, and the downward acceleration of C as $a_{C}$. Then
$$ T-m_{A}g=m_{A}a_{A}, $$
$$ m_{C}g-2T\cos\theta=m_{C}a_{C}. $$
Eliminating $T$ yields
$$ m_{C}g-2m_{A}(g+a_{A})\cos\theta=m_{C}a_{C}. \tag{1} $$
The component of $a_{C}$ along the rope direction, $a_{C}\cos\theta$, is the combination of $a_{A}$ and $a_{C_{c}}$. Referring to Figure 3-17, we have
$$ a_{C}\cos\theta=a_{A}-a_{C_{c}}, $$
$$ a_{C_{c}}=\frac{(v_{C}\sin\theta)^{2}}{l/\sin\theta}, $$
where the second expression arises because $a_{C_{c}}$ is caused by the angular motion of C relative to the left‑upper end of the rope. Rearranging gives
$$ a_{C}\cos\theta=a_{A}-\frac{v_{C}^{2}\sin^{2}\theta}{l}. \tag{2} $$
Substituting the relevant data into equations (1) and (2) gives
$$ a_{A}=a_{B}=4.14\,\text{m}/\!\text{s}^{2}, $$
$$ a_{C}=0.996\,\text{m}/\!\text{s}^{2}. $$
img_cn: 图3-15展示了一个物理系统：两个等高的小定滑轮相距2m，用轻绳连接，绳水平段中点挂有一个小物块C，两端分别悬挂物块A和B。物块A、B质量各1kg，物块C质量1.9kg。系统初始静止，C释放后三物块同时运动。
图3-16展示了物块C下降0.75m时的几何关系。图中标注了l=1m，h=0.75m，以及由几何关系导出的倾角θ，其正弦、余弦、余切值分别为4/5、3/5、3/4。
图3-17是物块C运动时的受力分析示意图。图中展示了绳中张力T、重力m_C g等力的方向，并标注了加速度a_C沿绳方向和法向的分量，以及相关的几何关系。
img_en: Figure 3-15 shows a physical system: two small fixed pulleys of equal height are 2m apart, connected by a light rope. A small block C is hung at the midpoint of the horizontal segment of the rope, and blocks A and B are suspended at the two ends. Masses: A=1kg, B=1kg, C=1.9kg. Initially at rest, after C is released, all three blocks start moving simultaneously.

Figure 3-16 shows the geometric relationship when block C descends 0.75m. The diagram labels l=1m, h=0.75m, and the inclination angle θ derived from the geometry, with sine, cosine, and cotangent values 4/5, 3/5, 3/4, respectively.

Figure 3-17 is a force‑analysis diagram of block C during motion. It shows the directions of forces such as rope tension T and gravity m_C g, and indicates the components of acceleration a_C along the rope direction and normal direction, as well as the relevant geometric relationships.
